CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `label` TEXT NOT NULL, `colorTag` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sortOrder` INTEGER NOT NULL, `collapsed` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `hostname` TEXT NOT NULL, `port` INTEGER NOT NULL, `keyType` TEXT NOT NULL, `publicKeyBase64` TEXT NOT NULL, `fingerprint` TEXT NOT NULL, `firstSeen` INTEGER NOT NULL)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `profileId` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `durationMs` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `details` TEXT, `verboseLog` TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(`profileId`) REFERENCES `connection_profiles`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_connection_logs_profileId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_connection_logs_profileId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`profileId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `label` TEXT NOT NULL, `keyType` TEXT NOT NULL, `privateKeyBytes` BLOB NOT NULL, `publicKeyOpenSsh` TEXT NOT NULL, `fingerprintSha256` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isEncrypted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `biometricProtected` INTEGER NOT NULL, `certificateBytes` BLOB, `caConfigId` TEXT, `certIssuedAt` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `profileId` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `bindAddress` TEXT NOT NULL, `bindPort` INTEGER NOT NULL, `targetHost` TEXT NOT NULL, `targetPort` INTEGER NOT NULL, `enabled` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`profileId`) REFERENCES `connection_profiles`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )
